0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/UncleSamSwiss/ioBroker.loxone/blob/master/package.json).
